title: asplenium ruta-muraria subsp. ruta-muraria
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria subsp. ruta-muraria, also known as Wall Rue or Wall Fern, is a small, delicate species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. Traditionally, Wall Rue has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting kidney function. The herbal preparation of Wall Rue typically involves drying the plant material, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
